name: Lemon Bars
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350°F. Mix together melted butter, powdered sugar, and flour until well blended.
Press the mixture into the bottom of a 9x13-inch glass baking dish. Bake for 20 minutes.
Sift together sugar, flour, and baking powder into a mixing bowl. Add eggs, lemon juice, and lemon rind. Beat by hand or with an electric mixer until well blended. Pour the mixture over the crust and bake for 25 minutes.
Allow bars to cool completely before dusting with powdered sugar and cutting into squares.
Yield: 24 Lemon Bars
